narrative:
Liberty Twp 24 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,462 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
